headline: Why Is 3M (MMM) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of industrial conglomerate 3M (NYSE: MMM) jumped 6.1% in the pre-market session after the company reported second-quarter results that beat Wall Street expectations and raised its full-year profit forecast. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $2.40, topping consensus estimates of $2.25. Sales reached $6.5 billion, reflecting 5.4% organic growth compared to the previous year.
